substep.title: Inventory Medium Findings
substep.action:
From {{findings.angles}} extract all findings where severity == "Medium". Store as {{medium_findings}}.
If empty, skip to step 4.

substep.title: Prompt User Per Finding
substep.action: For each Medium finding (one at a time, via Question tool):

check.action: Keep severity as Medium. Verdict stays BLOCKED.
Set finding.user_waived = true. The finding still appears in the verification doc but does NOT block.

substep.title: Re-Compute Verdict
substep.action:
Re-aggregate findings per the verdict rules: - Any Critical or High → BLOCKED - Any Medium without user_waived == true → BLOCKED - Otherwise → PROCEED
Update {{findings.verdict}}. If verdict changed from BLOCKED to PROCEED via waivers, also set {{findings.loop_back_target}} = null.
